transcription.text: Condoms, man! It's repression, man! Just another tool of the establishment, just to bring us down! They say we gotta use them, but who are they? Well, they wanna control us with their condoms, but not me, man! Cause I ain't wearing one, and letting... Sheik, use one or get none? Well, these are cool! I mean, I'd use them! I got you! I'd like them, and I'd use them all the time! Sheik, get some. Thank you! Thank you, Mr. Sheik!

segments.text: Just another tool of the establishment, just to bring us down!
They say we gotta use them, but who are they?
Well, they wanna control us with their condoms, but not me, man!
Cause I ain't wearing one, and letting...
Sheik, use one or get none?
Well, these are cool! I mean, I'd use them!
I got you! I'd like them, and I'd use them all the time!
Thank you! Thank you, Mr. Sheik!

metadata.title: 1996 Durex Sheik Cndom Use One or Get None
